idea: Mobile app that helps new parents track baby feeding, sleep, and diaper changes, with a shared real-time view for both parents and caregivers
notes: Canonical fixture for vertical-slice testing. Exercises: app stores (iOS + Android), Meta ads (Huckleberry is a heavy advertiser), Reddit parenting subs (r/NewParents, r/beyondthebump), real pricing competitors with Wayback history, G2/review sites N/A (consumer).
